section.heading: Establishment and protection of water rights

content.p: There are authorized to be appropriated for expenditure by the Forest Service such sums as may be necessary for the investigation and establishment of water rights, including the purchase thereof or of lands or interests in lands or rights-of-way for use and protection of water rights necessary or beneficial in connection with the administration and public use of the national forests.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: This section was enacted as a part of the Department of Agriculture Organic Act of 1944.

note.heading: Interim Moratorium on Bypass Flows
